evals.expected_output: ASCII art greeting saying 'Hello, <current username>!' using the standard figlet font via the hello_ascii.py script
expectations: The output contains ASCII art (multi-line text made of characters like |, _, /, \)
The greeting includes the actual system username (not a placeholder like 'User' unless that is the real username)
The word 'Hello' appears in the ASCII art
The output is wrapped in a code block to preserve spacing
